scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[:NOT_EXIST]->(x)
RETURN n, collect(x)
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: OPTIONAL MATCH not yet supported

scenarios.id: Aggregation5 - Collect-[2] OPTIONAL MATCH and `collect()` on node property
scenarios.description: [2] OPTIONAL MATCH and `collect()` on node property
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (f:DoesExist)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n:DoesNotExist)
RETURN collect(DISTINCT n.num) AS a, collect(DISTINCT f.num) AS b
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: OPTIONAL MATCH not yet supported
